data.title: Malaga Financial Corp declares 85th quarterly cash dividend of 25 cents per share, 4.89% annual yield.
data.description: Malaga Financial Corporation (OTCPink:MLGF) of Palos Verdes Estates, Calif., declared a cash dividend of 25 cents per share on September 12, 2025. Shareholders as of September 23, 2025, will receive the dividend around October 1, 2025. The company's Chairman, President, and CEO, Randy C. Bowers, highlighted that the 25-cent quarterly dividend equates to a 4.89% annualized yield based on the recent closing price of $20.43 per share. Bowers expressed gratitude towards their team for enabling the declaration of the 85th consecutive quarterly cash dividend as a reward to their loyal shareholders.

data.title: Merit Medical receives CE Mark for using Embosphere Microspheres to treat knee osteoarthritis, providing patients with consistent and effective results.
data.description: Patients suffering from knee osteoarthritis can now benefit from Embosphere's reliable and efficient clinical outcomes, thanks to an expanded indication. This new development offers significant advantages to patients, demonstrating the consistency and predictability of Embosphere's effectiveness in treating knee osteoarthritis.

data.title: GEMI stock skyrockets on Nasdaq debut with $425M raise, part of crypto IPO trend amid high investor interest in digital assets.
data.description: Gemini's recent Nasdaq debut has solidified its position as a leader in the crypto market, raising an impressive $425 million. This event is part of a trend of successful crypto IPOs, reflecting a growing investor interest in digital asset equities.

data.title: Brynson™ introduces industry's first fee transparency compliance tool for multifamily sector. NY, Sept. 12, 2025.
data.description: Brynson™, a leading company known for ILS Management™ and introducing unbiased intelligence to multifamily through Brynsights™, made a significant announcement in New York on September 12, 2025. The firm unveiled a new initiative aimed at enhancing fee transparency and simplifying compliance measures. This development marks another milestone for Brynson™, solidifying its position as an industry innovator. This groundbreaking launch is set to revolutionize the sector by providing secure solutions and upholding the company’s commitment to pioneering advancements.

data.title: Nasdaq outperforms Dow in stock market today; Warner Bros. sees spike. Oracle faces decline post sharp reversal.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline, falling below a crucial threshold. Oracle faced additional challenges following a significant turnaround. The Nasdaq outperformed the Dow in the stock market today, with Warner Bros. witnessing a surge in numbers. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Atlantic resolves writer's lawsuit over retracted article, ending defamation dispute with Ruth Shalit Barrett.
data.description: In a detailed editor's note, journalist Ruth Shalit Barrett has publicly accused the magazine of defaming her.

data.title: Gemini's Nasdaq debut hits $4.4B valuation, marking a busy IPO week in the U.S. since 2021.
data.description: In a showcase of the most bustling week for initial public offerings in the United States since 2021, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange marked a notable highlight.

data.title: Senator Jain & Councilmember Henderson to discuss D.C. autonomy on Sept. 16. Topics: D.C. statehood, congressional control, National Guard. Scheduled at National Press Club.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Senator Ankit Jain and Councilmember Christina Henderson are set to engage in a discussion at the National Press Club in Washington. The focus will be on congressional attempts to assume authority over D.C., the activation of National Guard personnel, and the relevance of these developments to the ongoing campaign for D.C. statehood. The conversation aims to shed light on the implications of these actions and their impact on the political landscape, highlighting the significance of recent events in advocating for statehood for D.C.

data.title: Health Union announces winners of 2025 Social Health Awards, spotlighting health leaders driving transformative change in digital health.
data.description: In an event held in Philadelphia on September 12, 2025, a premier program has been launched to recognize health leaders who are spearheading transformative changes in digital health. Health Union, a prominent player in online health communities and the owner of the largest network of health leaders known as the Social Health Network, is proud to be at the forefront of this initiative. This program aims to highlight the contributions of individuals driving innovation in digital health and shaping the future of the industry.

data.title: Trader prefers Dogecoin, Solana ETFs over XRP, sees Bonk as 'explosive' meme coin. Bonk breaking out, with catalysts including Dogecoin ETF.
data.description: A pseudonymous millionaire meme coin trader known as Unipcs has highlighted the current buzz in the crypto industry, mentioning catalysts such as the upcoming Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) ETF and expectations of rate cuts. Unipcs pointed out that amidst this excitement, one highly potential meme coin that is being overlooked is Bonk (CRYPTO: BONK). In a recent post, Unipcs highlighted that Bonk has broken out of a descending wedge that spanned multiple months, accompanied by strong volume, a pattern that often signals upcoming parabolic rallies. Unipcs mentioned various factors contributing to this positive outlook, including the launch of both DOGE and BONK ETFs and the anticipated approval of certain developments.
